name: Discovery Engine — Paper Extraction
tagline: Extract structured knowledge from scientific papers autonomously
description: Autonomous agent that discovers scientific papers from arXiv, PubMed Central, OpenAlex, and OSTI, extracts structured knowledge (entities, relations, cross-domain connections) using any LLM, and contributes results to a growing open-access knowledge graph. Self-contained — no pip install needed, just Python 3.10+ and an API key. Supports Anthropic, OpenRouter (DeepSeek), Gemini, OpenAI, and local models (ollama, vllm).
